title: goniophlebium loriceum
intro: Goniophlebium loriceum, also known as the Loricate polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Goniophlebium loriceum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being applied topically in the form of poultices and ointments.
